feature_title: Plan - Frontend Quality Visibility Lint Fixes

plan.title: Plan - Frontend Quality Visibility Lint Fixes
plan.objective: Resolve the reported Frontend Quality Visibility lint failures in a minimal, behavior-preserving change set so targeted lint checks pass cleanly.
in_scope: Fix only the reported frontend lint issues while preserving runtime behavior.
Clean targeted lint output for listed files and stable behavior semantics.
out_of_scope: No unrelated refactors, no broad style churn, and no full-suite execution beyond targeted lint/test checks needed to validate these exact failures.

acceptance_criteria: Reported hook dependency and unused variable findings are resolved
Targeted lint passes for touched files
tasks.outcome: Removed unnecessary useMemo dependencies for artist/album gap-fill hooks. | Resolved unused variable/argument lint findings in player and overflow components. | Replaced raw img usage with next/image in avatar surfaces flagged by quality checks.
evidence: verify:cd frontend && npx eslint --max-warnings=0 features/artist/hooks/useTidalTopTracks.ts features/artist/hooks/useYtMusicTopTracks.ts features/album/hooks/useTidalGapFill.ts features/album/hooks/useYtMusicGapFill.ts components/ui/TrackOverflowMenu.tsx components/player/SyncedLyrics.tsx components/player/PlaybackQualityBadgeWithStats.tsx components/player/FullPlayer.tsx components/layout/UserAvatarMenu.tsx components/activity/SocialTab.tsx

source_plan.feature_title: Plan - Frontend Quality Visibility Lint Fixes

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Resolve the reported Frontend Quality Visibility lint failures in a minimal, behavior-preserving change set so targeted lint checks pass cleanly.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: No unrelated refactors, no broad style churn, and no full-suite execution beyond targeted lint/test checks needed to validate these exact failures.

spec_outline.summary: Address unnecessary hook dependencies, unused variables/args, and Next.js no-img-element findings in the specific reported files.

full_spec_outline.objective: Fix only the reported frontend lint issues while preserving runtime behavior.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Clean targeted lint output for listed files and stable behavior semantics.
acceptance_criteria: All listed lint failures are removed
No new lint failures are introduced in touched files

refined_spec.summary: Prefer minimal local fixes: correct dependency arrays, remove/rename unused bindings, and replace raw img usage with compliant Next.js patterns.

full_refined_spec.decision: Apply the narrowest code edits per finding and run targeted lint verification for touched paths.
full_refined_spec.rationale: This resolves CI visibility failures quickly with low regression risk and avoids unrelated churn in an already dirty workspace.
acceptance_criteria: Diff remains constrained to reported files

implementation_plan.summary: Execute one atomic worker slice to patch all reported lint errors and verify via targeted lint on touched files.

acceptance_criteria: Reported hook dependency and unused variable findings are resolved
Targeted lint passes for touched files

delivered: Removed unnecessary useMemo dependencies for artist/album gap-fill hooks.
Resolved unused variable/argument lint findings in player and overflow components.
Replaced raw img usage with next/image in avatar surfaces flagged by quality checks.
verification_testing: verify:cd frontend && npx eslint --max-warnings=0 features/artist/hooks/useTidalTopTracks.ts features/artist/hooks/useYtMusicTopTracks.ts features/album/hooks/useTidalGapFill.ts features/album/hooks/useYtMusicGapFill.ts components/ui/TrackOverflowMenu.tsx components/player/SyncedLyrics.tsx components/player/PlaybackQualityBadgeWithStats.tsx components/player/FullPlayer.tsx components/layout/UserAvatarMenu.tsx components/activity/SocialTab.tsx
